'''Jondrell Inx''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] in opposition to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] presence in the [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sector]].

==Biography==
Jondrell Inx operated as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] in [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] throughout the [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sector]], with many systems, including settlements on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kallistas]], benefiting from his generosity. While doing so he became the nemesis of [[Imperial Prefect|Prefect]] [[Dengless Rinn]], who posted a large [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head. Inx employed a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] named [[Pallas Quintell]], who eventually left his crew to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]; however, they remained on good terms.

Soon after Quintell's capture by Rinn's agents, and after Inx took control of Quintell's previous headquarters, Inx met [[Cressis Linrec]], the daughter of governor [[Linrec]], while she was running away from an arranged marriage with [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Raiss]]. Cressis wanted to join his crew and seduce Inx as a means of getting revenge on her father; however, Inx wanted to sell her to the [[Zygerrian Slavers Guild]]. Under pressure from governor Linrec, and wanting to hide his own agenda, Rinn hired three bounty hunters to track Inx for a substantial reward.

==Appearances==
